paper_title: Bee Colony Performance Study in Mugla Province

methods.description: Process for setting up bee colonies and feeding them with different diets to study their performance.

steps.description: Experimental colonies were obtained from local beekeepers then re-queened with sister queens and were housed in standard Langstroth hives and equalized with respect to colony strength, sealed brood area, food stocks and colony weights before the research began.
steps.searchable_summary: obtain and prepare bee colonies for experiment

steps.description: Total 20 colonies were randomly arranged into four groups and each group consisted of 5 colonies.
steps.searchable_summary: randomly assign bee colonies into groups

steps.description: During the experiment; the colonies were fed with only pollen, pollen and water, only water and control group colonies were fed with nothing.
steps.searchable_summary: feed bee colonies with different diets

methods.description: Measurement of colony performance parameters such as sealed brood areas and number of frames with adult bees.

steps.description: Measurements of sealed brood areas and number of frames with adult bees were taken with 21 days.
steps.searchable_summary: measure sealed brood areas and frames with adult bees every 21 days

steps.description: The size of sealed brood areas were calculated according to Fresnaye and Lensky (1961) and the wintering abilities (population reduction) were calculated by the formula given by Genç (1990).
steps.searchable_summary: calculate sealed brood area size and wintering abilities

methods.description: Statistical procedures used to analyze the collected data on colony performance.

steps.description: Colony performance parameters (number of frames with adult worker bees and sealed brood areas) were analyzed by Repeated Measure (GLM).
steps.searchable_summary: perform repeated measure GLM analysis on colony performance data

steps.description: Honey yield and wintering ability were performed randomized plot design (ANOVA).
steps.searchable_summary: perform ANOVA on honey yield and wintering ability

steps.description: Group comparisons among the means were done with Duncan's multiple range test.
steps.searchable_summary: perform Duncan's multiple range test for group comparisons
